race.description: Sportsbet Same Race Multi Mdn Plate
race.comment: EXTRA FLING (2) raced handy on debut last start and gave a good sight, holding on for second and beaten a head at Balaklava. Is sure to have come on from that and can break through this time. GOODLOOKIN' GURU (6) returns. Was good on debut when in the market and has trialled up well in readiness. Gets a key booking in Holder and is expected to be very competitive fresh. HERE SHE IS (7) is knocking on the door and strips rock-hard fit now. Keeps Crowther and is in the mix. CONTRARY (9) is a King's Legacy filly on debut for the Clarken & MacGillivray partnership. Ticking along nicely at the trials and gets in light with the claim. Worth some thought, especially if there's market support.
